name: @cyanautomation/kaseki-agent
description: Admin/helper/doctor toolbox and local API client for Kaseki diagnostics, setup, and API-backed coding-agent task workflows
author: CyanAutomation

scripts.build: tsc && tsc -p tsconfig.scripts.json && node dist/add-js-extensions.js && npm run generate:openapi && npm run check:dist-dynamic-imports && chmod 0755 dist/*.js
scripts.check: npm run type-check && npm run lint
scripts.test:cli: npm run build && npm run test:cli:install && npm run test:cli:verify
scripts.test:cli:install: npm run test:cli:install-local && npm run test:cli:install-npx
scripts.test:cli:verify: npm run build && kaseki-agent --help && kaseki-agent doctor --help && kaseki-agent run --help && kaseki-agent list --help && kaseki-agent report --help && kaseki-agent status --help && kaseki-agent cancel --help
scripts.test:ci: npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run test:unit -- --forceExit && npm run test:tree-sitter:functional && bash tests/allowlist-glob.test.sh && bash tests/restore-disallowed-changes.test.sh && bash tests/auto-lint-cleanup-allowlist.test.sh && bash tests/auto-lint-cleanup-classification.test.sh && bash tests/validation-allowlist-state.test.sh && bash tests/trailing-whitespace-cleanup.test.sh && bash tests/dependency-restore-mode.test.sh && bash tests/startup-check-status-aggregation.test.sh && bash tests/startup-check-packaging.test.sh && bash tests/maturity-score-output.test.sh && bash tests/doctor-template-parity.test.sh && bash tests/npm-install-flags.test.sh && bash tests/repo-memory.test.sh && bash tests/unset-path-defaults.test.sh && bash tests/baseline-log-dir-fallback.test.sh && bash tests/pre-agent-validation-order.test.sh && bash tests/gateway-provider-capability.test.sh && bash tests/provider-defaults.test.sh && bash tests/gateway-model-defaults.test.sh && bash tests/scouting-order.test.sh && bash tests/inspect-scouting-fallback.test.sh && bash tests/inspect-mode-defaults.test.sh && bash tests/goal-check-malformed-artifact.test.sh && bash scripts/test-github-app.sh && bash tests/github-app-token-install-layout.test.sh && bash tests/github-preflight-helper-load.test.sh && bash tests/run-kaseki-github-app-worker-env.test.sh && bash tests/pi-gateway-provider-discovery.test.sh
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:sh || true
scripts.lint:unused: eslint . src/ --ignore-pattern dist/ --rule 'unused-imports/no-unused-imports: error' --rule 'unused-imports/no-unused-vars: [error, {vars: all, varsIgnorePattern: ^_, args: after-used, argsIgnorePattern: ^_}]'
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:js:fix && npm run lint:sh
scripts.test:packaging-verification: bash tests/verify-affected-binaries.test.sh && npm run test:pack-artifact && npm pack --dry-run && node dist/cli.js --version && node dist/cli.js --help && node dist/cli.js doctor --help && node dist/cli.js run --help && node dist/cli.js list --help && node dist/cli.js report --help && node dist/cli.js status --help && node dist/cli.js cancel --help && npm run check:dist-dynamic-imports
